summary.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
Checklist challenge-action response format, dual concurrence/response CRM, memorized 
checklists, ground handling signals, safety check/call prior to cockpit entry and departing 
aircraft, and blindfold cockpit check
topics:
safety check/call prior to cockpit entry and departing 
aircraft

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
No start, hung start, hot start, loss of start ready light during start sequence, battery bus light 
during start, fire on ground, emergency engine shutdown on the ground, emergency ground 
egress, and CFS and ejection CRM
topics: loss of start ready light during start sequence
emergency engine shutdown on the ground

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
Abort takeoff, aircraft departs prepared surface, engine failure immediately after takeoff, 
engine failure during flight, immediate air-start, PMU NORM air-start, PMU OFF air-start, 
uncommanded power changes/LOP, uncommanded prop feather, smoke and fume 
elimination, fire warning in flight, controlled ejection and eject

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
Chip detector warning, oil system malfunction or low oil pressure, low fuel pressure, 
hydraulic system malfunctions, landing gear emergency extension, OBOGS fail message, 
runaway trim, precautionary emergency landing (PEL) and BFI
topics: oil system malfunction or low oil pressure

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
Normal takeoff, local area departure, integrated (VMC) scan, turn pattern, level speed change, 
power-on stalls, power-off stall (ELP Stall), landing pattern (approach turn and landing 
attitude) stalls, intentional spin entry, incipient spin recovery, and steady-state spin recovery
topics:
landing pattern (approach turn and landing 
attitude) stalls

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
Normal takeoff, local area departure, inadvertent trim actuation, landing pattern, takeoff flap 
landings, landing flap landings, no-flap landings, full-stop landings, wave-off, and contact 
unusual attitudes

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
Crosswind limits, crosswind computations, crosswind takeoff, pattern adjustments for 
crosswinds, crosswind landings, crosswind T&Gs, crosswind full-stops, aborted takeoff, 
aircraft departs prepared surface, and HUD

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
Local course rules, OLF arrival and departure, home field arrival, and local VFR sectional 
review

items.curriculumTitle: NAVAL AIR TRAINING COMMAND NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TEXAS CIN Q-2A-0266, CIN Q-2A-0366,
items.discussText:
“IMSAFE” checklist, CRM, see & avoid principle, cloud clearances, and local VFR sectional 
review

items.discussText: Three Cs, slow flight, SCATSAFE maneuver, energy management, and slip

items.discussText: OLF entry, OLF/RDO communication, crosswind takeoff and landings, and wave-off
